name: RESCUE ziltivekimab chronic kidney disease inflammation trial
summary: A randomized phase 2 trial of IL-6 ligand inhibition with ziltivekimab in chronic kidney disease patients with elevated hsCRP and high cardiovascular risk.
population: Adults with moderate to severe chronic kidney disease and hsCRP of at least 2 mg/L

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Cytokine and Inflammasome Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and safety in Adults with moderate to severe chronic kidney disease and hsCRP of at least 2 mg/L. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
